wts.description: Create a git worktree and tmux session
wts.template: Create or switch to a git worktree and ensure the tmux-backed opencode session exists by running `zsh -ic 'gwtcs $ARGUMENTS'`. Treat the first argument as the branch name, rely on the dotfiles-managed `gwtcs` alias which uses worktrunk behind the scenes, report the active worktree path plus tmux session/window names, and surface any failure clearly.
